Calculate real unit labor cost
Calculate real compensation

S010.description: Gold Prices and Wholesale Price Indexes (Source Table)

S206.name: GDP/GDI Decomposition and Business NOS
S206.subseries_note: 55 base columns (S206-A-S206BC) covering GDP, GDI, EC, NOS decomposition by sector (household, NPISH, government, business). 14 EXT + 2 COMBINED columns for BEA extensions.

S206AW.name: Business NOS (NIPA)
S206AW.source: Derived: NOS - NOShh - NOSnpish - NOSgov - NOSgoventerp

construction.desc: Load BEA NIPA T1.7.5 (GDP, SD), T1.10 (GDI components)
Decompose by sector: household, NPISH, government, business
Derive business GVA, EC, GOS, NOS as residuals

extension.note: Extensions pre-computed in Chopped CSV via pull_bea_ch06.py

provenance.conceptual_continuity: Same BEA methodology, updated tables
provenance.vintage_note: Pre-computed via pull_bea_ch06.py

S207.name: Wage Equivalent and Corporate/Noncorporate Split
S207.subseries_note: 17 base columns (S207-A-S207-Q) covering WEQ2 wage-equivalent calculation, corporate sector accounts. 7 EXT + 4 COMBINED.

construction.desc: Load BEA T1.13 (proprietors' income), T1.14 (corporate accounts)
Calculate corporate wage-profit ratio sigma = ECcorp/Pcorp
Calculate WEQ2 = (sigma*PropInc - ECprop)/(1+sigma)
Noncorporate profit = PropInc - WEQ2

provenance.conceptual_continuity: Same BEA methodology, updated tables
provenance.vintage_note: Pre-computed via pull_bea_ch06.py

S208.name: Imputed Interest Adjustment and Sectoral Profit Rates
S208.subseries_note: 51 base columns (S208-A-S208AY) covering imputed interest adjustment, corrected business/corporate/noncorporate accounts, and sectoral profit rates. 8 EXT + 8 COMBINED.

S208AB.name: Corporate NOS adjusted for imputed interest

construction.desc: Load BEA T7.11 (imputed interest), FA T6.1 (capital stocks)
Calculate imputed interest adjustment for business and corporate sectors
Derive corrected GVA, EC, GOS, NOS for business, corporate, noncorporate
Calculate sectoral profit rates: r = NOS/KNC(-1)

provenance.conceptual_continuity: Same BEA methodology, updated tables
provenance.vintage_note: Pre-computed via pull_bea_ch06.py

S208.description: Imputed Interest Adjustment and Sectoral Profit Rates

S209.name: GPIM Corporate Capital Stock
S209.subseries_note: 19 base columns (S209-A-S209-S) covering BEA current-cost/chain-index/historical-cost net stock, deflators, depreciation, investment, GPIM approximations. 8 EXT + 4 COMBINED.

construction.desc: Load BEA FA T6.1-T6.8 (capital stocks, depreciation, investment)
GPIM capital stock estimation using current/constant/historical cost data

provenance.conceptual_continuity: Same BEA methodology, updated tables
provenance.vintage_note: Pre-computed via pull_bea_ch06.py

construction.desc: Load BEA 2011/1993/SCB 1985 initial values, compute ratios

provenance.conceptual_continuity: Same BEA methodology, updated tables
provenance.vintage_note: Pre-computed via pull_bea_ch06.py

S211.name: GPIM Variant - BEA 1993 vs 2011

construction.desc: Load BEA 1993 capital stock data, compute adjusted KNC/KGC

provenance.conceptual_continuity: Same BEA methodology, updated tables
provenance.vintage_note: Pre-computed via pull_bea_ch06.py

provenance.vintage_note: Pre-computed via pull_bea_ch06.py

provenance.vintage_note: Pre-computed via pull_bea_ch06.py

S214.subseries_note: 14 base columns (S214-A-S214-N). IRS corporate inventories, total capital stock, GPIM final measures. 3 EXT + 3 COMBINED.

extension.note: IRS inventories proxied at constant 2011 ratio post-2011

provenance.vintage_note: Pre-computed via pull_bea_ch06.py

S013.name: Final Profit Rate Measures
S013.subseries_note: 52 base columns (S013-A-S013AZ) covering final profit measures, capacity utilization, and incremental rates of profit. 6 EXT + 20 COMBINED. Terminal table depending on all upstream tables.

construction.desc: Load upstream tables S208 (profit) and S214 (capital stock)
Corrected measures: VA, NOS, profit share, profit rate (with imputed interest + GPIM)
Conventional measures: NIPA profit rate (without corrections)
Component ratios x1, x2, x3 decomposing corrected/conventional difference
Capacity utilization and normal profit rates
Incremental rates of profit (nominal and real)

extension.note: Extensions derived from upstream S208 and S214 extended data

provenance.conceptual_continuity: Same BEA methodology, updated tables
provenance.vintage_note: Pre-computed via pull_bea_ch06.py

construction.step: Load S216 parsed data (OECD industry IROP with PPP)
Compute cross-industry average IROP per year
Compute individual industry deviations from average
Output per-industry deviations as subseries (S038-A through S038-BF)
Composite series = cross-industry std dev of deviations per year

extension.source: OECD STAN 2025 (GOPS + GFCF by industry) + PWT 10.01 (PPP conversion)

provenance.shaikh_source: OECD STAN 2003 + PWT 6.2, IROP = ΔGOPS_PPP / GFCF_PPP(-1)
provenance.conceptual_continuity: Same methodology (PPP-adjusted IROP by industry), different OECD vintage and PWT version. ISIC Rev 3→Rev 4 industry mapping. Mean deviation overlap MAE=0.04.

provenance.shaikh_source: Flow of Funds TD3 line 2 (HH Debt) / NIPA T2.1 line 27 (Disp. Income)
provenance.conceptual_continuity: Same Flow of Funds household debt series. PI is broader than disposable income but tracks the ratio closely.
provenance.vintage_note: PI used as proxy for disposable personal income (HHDispPersInc). Growth-rate splice preserves original ratio levels.

provenance.vintage_note: FODSP in percent; divided by 100 to match Shaikh decimal units.
